items.name: Basic Poison
description: You can use the poison in this vial to coat one slashing or piercing weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition.
Applying the poison takes an action.
A creature hit by the Poisoned weapon or ammunition must make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or take 1d4 poison damage. Once applied, the poison retains potency for 1 minute before drying.

items.name: Gorgon Blood
items.description: When ingested, the creature must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw.  On a failed save, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is restrained. It must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is petrified until freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic.

items.name: Gorgon Intestines
items.description: Used in a concoction for Stone To Flesh Oil.

items.name: Herb, Dreamleaf
items.description: Allows crafting Potions to be rolled with advantage. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Herb, Kingsblood
items.description: Used in many concoctions to brew powerful mind controlling potions.

items.name: Herb, Nightshade
items.description: When added to a concoction, turns it into poison, dealing 9d6 damage on a failed DC 17 Constitution saving throw. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Herb, Silverweed
items.description: When added to a concoction, gives a +1 to the crafting roll. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Herb, Sourgrass
items.description: When added to a concoction, multiplies the yield. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Leather, Dragon Scale
items.description: Leather required to make Dragon Scale Armor

items.name: Leather, Scales
items.description: Leather required to make Scale Armor

items.name: Leather, Smoldering Hide
items.description: Leather required to make Smoldering Hide Armor

items.name: Ore, Adamntine
items.description: Ore required to make Adamantine Items (Consumed on use)

items.name: Ore, Black Platinum
items.description: Refined ore which adds +1 Slot to any item. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Ore, Darksteel
items.description: Refined ore whichs adds +1 to the crafting roll. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Ore, Magikite
description: For it's size, it is very light. Magic clearly eminates from this item, although the nature unclear.

items.name: Ore, Mithral
items.description: Ore required to make Mithral Items (Consumed on use)

items.name: Stone To Flesh Oil.
description: When poured on a creature that has been turned to stone, the creature must perform a Constitution Saving Throw of DC 13 in order to break free.
On a successful save, the creature returns partially to flesh, suffering permanent Exhaustion Level 3. Only Greater Restoration or Wish spell can undo these changes.
However, the creature also gains +2 to AC while in this state.

items.name: Wood, Darkwood
items.description: Extremely hard wood whichs adds +1 to the crafting roll. (Consumed on use)

items.name: Wood, Ironwood
items.description: Extremely hard wood which adds +1 Slot to any item. (Consumed on use)
